name: airgapquery
description: Local-first document inspection and retrieval smoke tests for air-gapped QA workflows.

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js inspect fixtures/sample --format json --output out/smoke-report.json && node dist/src/cli.js query fixtures/sample --question "How do agents prove there are no hidden network calls?" --format markdown --top 2 && node scripts/no-network-smoke.mjs
scripts.release:check: npm run lint && npm run check && npm test && npm run smoke && npm pack --dry-run

author: Roger Chappel
